**What anti-pattern does this prevent?**
Describe the problem this feature would solve.

**Proposed solution**
Which type of addition?
- [ ] New rule (`.claude/rules/`)
- [ ] New hook (`.claude/hooks/`)
- [ ] New skill (`.claude/skills/`)
- [ ] Framework adaptation (Vue, Svelte, Angular)
- [ ] Other

**Description**
How should it work?

**Example**
Show a before/after of the anti-pattern being caught.
